title: Van Buren v. United States (2021) — CFAA
technical_focus: Contract and policy boundaries for system use

timeline.event: Supreme Court narrows CFAA “exceeds authorized access” for misuse of authorized access

evidence_artifacts: Access control policies and role definitions
engineering_takeaways: Technical “authorized” access may still be criminally charged under other theories; align policy, contracts, and monitoring.
Post-Van Buren, CFAA “exceeds authorized access” is narrower for pure policy/ purpose violations—update insider-threat playbooks with counsel.
